name: Nurture Engine - Email Sequences
description: Sends automated nurture email sequences to leads across both AuthiChain and QRON products
trigger: Webhook (triggered on schedule or by CRM events)
actions: Receive contact batch with sequence IDs and emails_sent history
Forward to AuthiChain /api/nurture/send for AuthiChain leads
Forward to QRON /api/nurture/send for QRON leads
Both endpoints determine the next email in the sequence and send via Resend/SendGrid
